findings.title: Path traversal guard present
findings.detail: validatePath rejects '..' and absolute paths before any git operation

findings.title: Denylist enforcement on ls-tree
findings.detail: isDenied filters paths in lsTree output

findings.title: Shell command construction uses string interpolation
findings.detail: readBlob constructs shell commands via template literals. Validated upstream but not shell-escaped.

findings.title: Size limit enforcement
findings.detail: readBlob enforces maxBytes after reading full blob into memory

findings.title: Schema validation on load
findings.detail: loadChatelet validates all required fields before returning KeepBudget

findings.title: Budget enforcement complete
findings.detail: checkKeepBudget checks maxFiles, maxLineCount, and allowedDirs constraints

findings.title: Symlink traversal not checked
findings.detail: getAllFilesRecursive follows symlinks. A symlink loop could cause deep recursion.

auditTrail.design: Append-only trail in .roadmap/trail.jsonl with global mirror. Archive via trail --archive.
